text_anchor: I cannot click on navigation links because the page content is covering them.
positive_node: <header className="sticky top-0 z-10 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-terra-200">

text_anchor: Users cannot see the product tags to identify featured items.
positive_node: <div className="absolute top-3 left-3 flex flex-col gap-2 z-0">

text_anchor: On large screens, I have to scroll endlessly through plants one at a time instead of seeing multiple plants at once.
positive_node: <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-1 xl:grid-cols-1 gap-6">

text_anchor: Users see a tall vertical stack of sustainability badges instead of a clean horizontal row.
positive_node: <div className="flex flex-col justify-center gap-8 md:gap-16 text-terra-800">

text_anchor: The giant footer title makes it hard to read the rest of the footer content.
I cannot read the plant care information because the text is tiny and the color is too light.
I cannot see the full banner content because products are stacked on top of it.
positive_node: <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12 -mt-20">

text_anchor: Text and information on plant cards is squeezed together with barely any breathing room.
I cannot read the banner headline because it disappears into the background photo.
positive_node: <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-terra-900/20 via-terra-800/10 to-transparent" />

text_anchor: An action button is sticking out of the bottom of plant cards where it shouldn't be visible.
positive_node: <button className="absolute -bottom-8 right-4 bg-white text-terra-900 p-3 rounded-full shadow-lg opacity-100 translate-y-4 group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:translate-y-0 transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-moss-600 hover:text-white">
